hero_subtitle: No more brand walls. No more distance gaps. High-fidelity voice communication for every rider, regardless of their device. Uniting the pack through pure technology.
data_deletion_intro: You have the right to request the deletion of your personal data stored by Helmove. If you proceed with this request, we will permanently remove your account, ride logs, social posts, and telemetry data from our servers.
data_deletion_warning: This action cannot be undone. Once your data is deleted, you will lose access to all your saved routes and rider profile statistics. If you wish to use Helmove again in the future, you will need to create a new account from scratch.
reason_placeholder: Tell us why you are leaving...
social_heart_subtitle: Helmove® isn't just about hearing your pack—it's about remembering every mile and connecting with riders worldwide.
ride_logs_desc: A ride is more than just miles; it's a story. Share photos from the summit, write about the hidden curves, and pin your memories to the map for the community to see.
rider_profiles_desc: Create a public profile, connect with riders worldwide, and discover local meetups and shared routes.
global_challenges_desc: Compete in weekly distance or elevation challenges. Climb the leaderboard and earn exclusive digital badges.
hardware_sync_desc: Pair your HELMIC™ unit for real-time telemetry syncing and instant voice-to-text ride logging.
hardware_intro: Designed by Bugsten to turn any helmet into a high-end communication hub. Unrivaled micro-processing for noise cancellation, bringing studio-quality fidelity to the chaos of the road.
bt_limit_desc: Why does your music sound like a 90s radio the moment you speak through your intercom? Because Bluetooth technology cannot simultaneously transmit microphone data and high-fidelity music (A2DP). This isn't a software bug; it's the physical limit of Bluetooth.
bt_bypass_desc: HELMIC™ physically shatters this limit. It dedicates your helmet speakers solely to High-Fidelity (Hi-Fi) music playback, while routing your microphone traffic through its own dedicated, noise-canceling micro-processor.
dedicated_link_desc: Because true audio quality makes no compromises. By establishing a dedicated physical or lossless link to your device, HELMIC™ rescues your microphone data from the Bluetooth bottleneck.
studio_music_desc: Your bass and treble remain pristine. Listen to the symphony without drops, even while you speak.
voice_isolation_desc: Wind and engine roar are eliminated. HELMIC's micro-processor isolates your voice with absolute studio clarity.
pro_discipline_desc: An Ultra-Low Latency architecture preferred by elite riders, eliminating the degradation of standard wireless networks.

telemetry.description: Don't just show where you've been; show how you conquered it. Automatically overlay lean angles, G-force, and altitude data onto your shared photos and videos. Turn every post into a high-tech ride report.

tech_specs.feature_tandem_desc: Engineered for high-speed intercepts. Helmove’s dedicated P2P protocol isolates the noise, delivering a direct link between the Lead and the Wingman. Absolute clarity when it matters most. Just crystal-clear communication optimized for highway wind noise and roaring engines.
tech_specs.feature_group_desc: Connect up to unlimited riders in a single room. Dynamic auto-reconnect ensures that if someone falls behind, they automatically re-join the pack once in range.
tech_specs.feature_social_desc: Capture and share live snippets while you're still on the road. The system integrates with your media to allow quick posting with telemetry data included.

philosophy_description: We believe the road shouldn't have borders, and neither should your voice. Helmove® was born from the frustration of proprietary intercoms and 'closed-loop' systems that force you to buy the same brand as your friends. Our mission is to break those chains.
philosophy_cross_brand_desc: Enables seamless, unlimited connectivity across all intercom brands.
philosophy_zero_drops_desc: Dynamic mesh routing keeps the group live.

dynamic_routing.title: DYNAMIC ROUTING.
dynamic_routing.description: Pro-level route planning. Create, share, and lead. Whether you are an Admin setting the pace or a Captain coordinating the turn, the route is synchronized for everyone in real-time.

app_links.title: Deploy Helmove
app_links.description: Join the most seamless communication network on the asphalt. Break hardware limits and download the power of zero-latency tactical riding with your group to your phone.

privacy_policy_page.intro: At Helmove, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application and related services.
privacy_policy_page.section1_content: We may collect information about you in a variety of ways, including:
privacy_policy_page.profile_info: Profile Information: Your name, email address, and profile picture provided during registration.
privacy_policy_page.geo_location: Geo-Location Information: Real-time location data to enable group sync and route tracking. This is only shared with your group when "Ghost Mode" is turned off.
privacy_policy_page.media_content: Media Content: Posts, "jots," and photos that you voluntarily share within the community.
privacy_policy_page.device_data: Device Data: Technical information such as device ID, model, and performance logs for troubleshooting and app optimization.
privacy_policy_page.section2_content: We use the collected information to provide a smooth and secure experience:
privacy_policy_page.use_case_1: To facilitate voice sessions and user-to-user messaging.
privacy_policy_page.use_case_2: To enhance riding safety and group coordination during trips.
privacy_policy_page.use_case_3: To personalize your user profile and social feed.
privacy_policy_page.use_case_4: To monitor and analyze usage and trends to improve your experience.
privacy_policy_page.section3_content: Your data is never sold to third parties for advertising purposes. We only share information with infrastructure providers (like LiveKit for voice communication) using technical identifiers necessary to provide the service, or when required by law.
privacy_policy_page.section4_content: You have full control over your data. You can update your profile, toggle location sharing via privacy settings, or delete your account at any time to permanently remove all personal data from our systems.
privacy_policy_page.section5_content: If you have questions or comments about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

terms_of_use_page.intro: This End User License Agreement (EULA) constitutes a legally binding agreement between you and Helmove concerning your access to and use of our mobile application and related services. By downloading, installing, or using Helmove, you agree to be bound by all of these terms. If you do not accept these Terms, please do not use the application.
terms_of_use_page.section1_content: You must be at least 13 years old to use this Application. By using the Application, you represent and warrant that you meet this age requirement. You must also have the legal capacity (and a valid motorcycle license where applicable) to use the app in your jurisdiction.
terms_of_use_page.section2_content: Helmove is designed to enhance your riding experience, but your primary responsibility is the safe operation of your vehicle.
terms_of_use_page.safety_rule_1: You agree to use Helmove (especially Intercom and "Jot" features) only when it is safe and legal to do so.
terms_of_use_page.safety_rule_2: Hands-free operation is mandatory. Do not attempt to interact with the screen while the vehicle is in motion.
terms_of_use_page.safety_rule_3: Helmove is not liable for any accidents, injuries, or fatalities resulting from distracted use of the application while riding.
terms_of_use_page.safety_rule_4: You use this service entirely at your own risk.
terms_of_use_page.section3_content: Helmove allows users to create, share, and edit content such as photos, "jots," and route information. You are solely responsible for the content you submit. You retain ownership of your content, but you grant Helmove a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to host, display, and share this content within the app's ecosystem.
terms_of_use_page.section4_content: We are committed to maintaining a safe and respectful community. The following content is strictly prohibited:
terms_of_use_page.conduct_1: Hate Speech: Content that promotes violence, discrimination, or hatred based on race, ethnicity, religion, gender, sexual orientation, disability, or other protected characteristics.
terms_of_use_page.conduct_2: Harassment and Bullying: Harassment, threats, or intimidation targeting other users.
terms_of_use_page.conduct_3: Dangerous Riding: Content that promotes or encourages illegal speeding, stunts, or reckless riding behavior.
terms_of_use_page.conduct_4: Illegal Activities: Content that promotes illegal actions, gatherings, or goods.
terms_of_use_page.conduct_5: Spam and Misinformation: Excessive, repetitive, or intentionally misleading content.
terms_of_use_page.section5_content: We actively monitor content to ensure compliance with these Terms.
terms_of_use_page.moderation_removal: Content Removal: We reserve the right to remove any content that violates these Terms or is deemed inappropriate, at our sole discretion and without prior notice.
terms_of_use_page.moderation_ban: User Bans: We reserve the right to suspend or permanently ban any user who violates these Terms — including those who post harmful content — without warning.
terms_of_use_page.section6_content: We provide tools to help users maintain a safe environment:
terms_of_use_page.reporting_report: Reporting: You can report any content or user that violates these Terms using the in-app "Report" feature. Reported content is reviewed by our team within 24 hours. If a violation is confirmed, the content will be removed and the user may be banned.
terms_of_use_page.reporting_block: Blocking: You can block abusive users. Blocking a user prevents them from interacting with you and removes their content from your feed.
terms_of_use_page.section7_content: By using the Application, you warrant that:
terms_of_use_page.rep_1: All registration information you submit is true and accurate.
terms_of_use_page.rep_2: You have the legal capacity and a valid motorcycle license (where applicable) to use the app in your jurisdiction.
terms_of_use_page.rep_3: You will comply with all local traffic laws and regulations.
terms_of_use_page.section8_content: The Application is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the Application will be uninterrupted, error-free, or completely secure, or that any errors will be corrected. All warranties and conditions are disclaimed to the maximum extent permitted by law.
terms_of_use_page.section9_content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Helmove and its developers shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages — including lost revenue, data loss, or personal injury — arising out of or related to your use of the Application.
terms_of_use_page.section10_content: For iOS users, the following terms apply in addition to the above:
terms_of_use_page.apple_1: Acknowledgement: This agreement is between you and Helmove only, not Apple. Helmove, not Apple, is solely responsible for the Application and its content.
terms_of_use_page.apple_2: License Scope: The license granted to you is limited to a non-transferable license to use the Application on any Apple-branded device you own or control, as permitted by the Apple Media Services Terms and Conditions.
terms_of_use_page.apple_3: Maintenance: Apple has no obligation to provide any maintenance or support services for the Application.
terms_of_use_page.apple_4: Warranty: If the Application fails to conform to any applicable warranty, you may notify Apple, and Apple will refund the purchase price. To the maximum extent permitted by law, Apple will have no other warranty obligation with respect to the Application.
terms_of_use_page.apple_5: Product Claims: Apple is not responsible for addressing any claims relating to product liability, legal compliance, or consumer protection. Such responsibility lies solely with Helmove.
terms_of_use_page.apple_6: Intellectual Property: In the event of any third-party intellectual property infringement claim, Helmove — not Apple — is solely responsible for the investigation, defense, settlement, and discharge of such claim.
terms_of_use_page.apple_7: Third-Party Terms: You must comply with applicable third-party terms of agreement when using the Application.
terms_of_use_page.apple_8: Third-Party Beneficiary: Apple and its subsidiaries are third-party beneficiaries of this agreement, and upon your acceptance of these Terms, Apple will have the right to enforce this agreement against you.
terms_of_use_page.section11_content: We reserve the right to change, modify, or remove the contents of the Application at any time for any reason at our sole discretion without notice. We will not be liable for any modification or service interruption.
terms_of_use_page.section12_content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
terms_of_use_page.footer: Ride safe, stay connected. Helmove Team.

support_center_page.intro: Need help with Helmove or your HELMIC hardware? Our support team is here to get you back on the road.
support_center_page.faq_desc: Browse frequently asked questions and step-by-step solution guides
support_center_page.tech_support_desc: Having trouble pairing with a specific brand or experiencing audio drops?
support_center_page.a1: Helmove is a brand-agnostic communication platform for motorcycle riders, enabling seamless voice communication between different intercom brands.
support_center_page.q2: Which devices is Helmove compatible with?
support_center_page.a2: Helmove works with Sena, Cardo, and all major Bluetooth/Mesh intercom brands. With the HELMIC hardware, you can also connect directly to your helmet speakers.
support_center_page.q3: My audio keeps dropping during rides. What should I do?
support_center_page.a3: Check your Bluetooth settings and try re-pairing your devices. If the issue persists, contact us at support@helmove.app.
support_center_page.q4: How do I connect my HELMIC unit?
support_center_page.a4: Open the app, go to "Pair Hardware," and bring your HELMIC unit close. Auto-detection completes within a few seconds.
support_center_page.q5: How do I delete my account?
support_center_page.a5: Go to Settings › Account › Data Deletion in the app to permanently delete your account. This action cannot be undone.
support_center_page.q6: How do I report inappropriate content?
support_center_page.a6: Use the three-dot menu next to any post and select "Report." Our team reviews all reports within 24 hours.
support_center_page.contact_desc: Couldn't find the answer you were looking for? Our support team is ready to get you back on the road as soon as possible.
support_center_page.footer: Helmove — Always with you on the road.
